items.title: Crypto market’s weekly winners and losers – DEXE, LIT, BONK, JUP
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tracking weekly performance of crypto assets highlights market trends that could influence investor sentiment and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: 3 crypto attacks in 24 hours – From fake apps to a $14.2M SOL theft
items.whyYouShouldCare: Recent security breaches, including a significant theft of SOL, raise concerns about the safety of assets on the Solana network and could impact user confidence.

items.title: Japan stablecoin payments advance with Lawson trial, Netstars launch
items.whyYouShouldCare: Advancements in stablecoin payments in Japan may enhance cross-border transactions and increase the demand for Solana's infrastructure in global markets.
